title: Give us a miracle AMV
wikitext:
[]: Give us a miracle AMV (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by bladerj » Mon Jun 07, 2010 1:03 am You know i was just listening to the symphonica of eva, and i had visual image of the sahaquiel battle in my mind, so i decided to play and add the track to the feature and see what happened, to my surprise the track fitted magnificently the action on display. This is not much of a editing AMV but a feel the song and enjoy the visual, sorta like disne fantasia. Here it is for your enjoyment [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S3reemsyFmU[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Mon Jun 07, 2010 1:10 am Nice work.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Mon Jun 07, 2010 1:16 am Fallingtogrey wrote: Purposely not putting the word "Evangelion" anywhere in the video info to stop it from being taken down? Also, I hope you didn't have the frame rate THAT low on purpose.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jun 07, 2010 1:19 am You can upload videos up to 2 GB to YouTube. Don't worry about compression.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Mon Jun 07, 2010 1:23 am Okay reuploading bigger version, should be up in the morning., just search for the same name

[]:             Quote Post by Marduk » Mon Jun 07, 2010 1:33 am I had a the same idea but with a different (hilariously fitting) music track awhile ago. I was waiting for the HD release but you beat me to it. Good job :)

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Mon Jun 07, 2010 3:50 am I doubt it.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Mon Jun 07, 2010 12:38 pm Fallingtogrey wrote: Was I right when I said that you purposely didn't include the word "Evangelion" anywhere in the vid info? I thought it was choppy to give it some kind of slow motion effect tbh. but it doesn't really work with Rebuild...

[]:             Quote Post by tedness » Tue Jun 08, 2010 11:57 pm Not sure what you're worried about. As long as you're not showing full episodes or unreleased content most companies don't care what you post. As far as most companies are concerned when it comes to AMVs, it's free publicity for them. Especially for high quality AMVs.

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Wed Jun 09, 2010 3:24 pm No more.

[]:             Quote Post by EdZ » Wed Jun 09, 2010 4:43 pm bladerj wrote: the original mpeg is 540 mb

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Thu Oct 14, 2010 12:54 pm bladerj wrote: Okay reuploading bigger version, should be up in the morning., just search for the same name
